author: y4rr
content: Result: Swin-T value-parity PASSES — max_abs_err=3.502e-7 max_rel_err=1.967e-3 vs abs_tol=1e-3 rel_tol=1e-2 numel=1000. ferrotorch-vision/src/models/swin.rs rewritten as full torchvision-parity ShiftedWindowAttention + PatchMerging. named_parameters matches torchvision swin_t state_dict 1:1 (172 keys, zero diff). 4 #[ignore=#998 ...] markers removed. All 4 swin_t_* tests PASS (value_parity + 3 loader-rejection probes). 187/187 conformance_vision_models tests PASS — zero regression on 14 prior PASS-able models. cargo build --workspace clean; cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision --all-targets -- -D warnings clean. Vision parity 14/15 → 15/15 = 100%. roll<T> backward absent — STOP-AND-REPORT respected: training-mode autograd unsupported; eval-mode parity bit-faithful.
